en: There he is. Honey, right here. He's right here.
Still can't see ya this time. Hey. Hey. Hi, Larry. Hi, Christine.
Good to see you. You okay? Yeah, thanks for coming to get me. Yeah, come on in.
I got severe tire damage. That sucks. Yeah.
You know those signs? It's true. Awful. Wait, hang on a second.
You got it? No. Wait, just stop. Stop.
No, no, no. Stop. Don't do anything. I'm not doing anything. You gotta... Just stop.
My car, the gate crashed right down. We were just taking Christine to yoga class, then we'll go to rehearsal.
Is that a prefix you think? Yo. Yoga.
ko: 이게 접두사라고 생각해? 요. 요가. 요거트.

en: Yogurt. Think that's related? Gurt. Ga.
